channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Inuit-led university in Nunangat aims to improve access to post-secondary education in the Arctic
item.description: The article explores how the planned Inuit Nunangat University, set to open in 2030 in Arviat, Nunavut, could transform access to higher education for Inuit students across Canada’s Arctic. For many I...

item.title: ACT Police investigate suspicious house fire in Richardson that left home uninhabitable
item.description: ACT Police are investigating a suspicious house fire that destroyed a property on Clift Crescent in Richardson overnight. Emergency services were called to the scene shortly before 3am on Sunday after...

item.title: Angeles City building collapse death toll rises to nine; search and clearing operations continue
item.description: The death toll from the building collapse in Barangay Balibago, Angeles City, Pampanga has risen to nine, according to the Bureau of Fire Protection (BFP) as of May 31, 2026. The incident occurred on ...

item.title: Rivers Police Strengthen Security Operations for Eid-el-Kabir and Children’s Day Celebrations
item.description: The Rivers State Police Command announced that it stepped up security operations across the state ahead of and during the Eid-el-Kabir and Children’s Day celebrations to ensure the safety of residents...

item.title: Gina Rinehart attends WA of the Year awards in disguise
item.description: Gina Rinehart, Australia's wealthiest individual, marked her seventh consecutive year at the top of the Australian Financial Review Rich List by attending the Western Australian of the Year awards inc...

item.title: Call for National Treasury probe into alleged irregular R70m Pretoria building lease process
item.description: A preliminary anti-corruption investigation within the Department of Public Works has raised serious concerns about a R70m lease agreement for office accommodation in Pretoria, prompting calls for an ...

item.title: Arsenal Hold Big Bus Parade in London to Mark Premier League Victory
item.description: Thousands of Arsenal fans jam-packed the streets of London as dem celebrate their first Premier League title since 2004. Fans dey everywhere, waving flags, chanting, and even climbing trees and traffi...

item.title: KMC Confirms Hill Park Land Remains Protected Amid Alleged Encroachments
item.description: Recently, controversy has emerged regarding alleged encroachments and constructions near Karachi's Hill Park, raising concerns about the effectiveness of KMC's land department. The KMC had issued a co...

item.title: Clashes between football supporters and riot police in Paris following the Champions League final
item.description: Football fans and riot police have clashed in Paris in the aftermath of the Champions League final, leading to public disorder in parts of the French capital. The incident unfolded as large crowds gat...

item.title: CBSE acknowledges and addresses cybersecurity flaws in Class 12 digital evaluation system amid student complaints
item.description: The Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) has acknowledged the presence of cybersecurity vulnerabilities in its On-Screen Marking (OSM) system, specifically within the OnMark portal used for eva...

item.title: Police arrest three NSCDC mining marshals over colleague’s death and probe ₦2bn financial transactions
item.description: The Nigeria Police Force has arrested three officers of the Nigeria Security and Civil Defence Corps (NSCDC) in connection with the death of Deputy Superintendent of Corps (DSC) Agada Levi Agada, who ...

item.title: Nampak results show mixed performance as Angola drives growth despite weaker diversified packaging segment
item.description: Nampak has reported a set of mixed interim financial results for the six months to end-March, with its overall performance shaped by strong growth in its beverage operations in Angola and South Africa...

item.title: Key national developments: Ghaziabad encounter, political tensions in West Bengal, and India–US trade talks
item.description: A series of significant developments unfolded across India in a packed evening news update. In Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, the prime accused in the murder of a teenager, identified as Asad, was killed d...

item.title: Analysis of Trump’s Iran intervention and its potential global geopolitical consequences compared to Vietnam
item.description: The article examines the geopolitical and strategic implications of Donald Trump’s brief conflict with Iran, questioning whether it could become a more significant global turning point than the Vietna...

item.title: Democratic leaders propose taxing Trump compensation fund payouts to block recipients from benefiting
item.description: Democratic governors and lawmakers across several U.S. states are advancing a coordinated strategy to counter a $1.8 billion fund associated with former President Donald Trump. The fund, described by ...

item.title: Niall Horan reflects on friendship with Liam Payne and shares memories following his death
item.description: Niall Horan has spoken openly about his memories of former One Direction bandmate Liam Payne following his death in 2024, aged 31. In an interview with The Times, Horan reflected on their long-standin...

item.title: Climate variability and crop losses threaten India's Alphonso mango production
item.description: India’s iconic Alphonso mango, popularly known as Hapus, is facing one of its most difficult seasons in recent memory due to extreme climate variability and environmental stress. Farmers in Maharashtr...

item.title: Government launches 2.1 billion shilling water infrastructure project to improve access in Maswa district
item.description: A major water infrastructure development valued at 2.1 billion Tanzanian shillings has been launched in Maswa district, located in the Simiyu region of northwestern Tanzania, with the aim of improving...

item.title: VP Sara Duterte expected to submit impeachment response ahead of Senate deadline
item.description: The camp of Vice President Sara Duterte is preparing to submit its formal response to the Senate on Monday, June 1, regarding the impeachment articles filed against her. According to her legal counsel...

item.title: Casey McLean stars as Panthers edge Warriors 20–18 after Origin debut
item.description: Penrith secured a hard-fought 20–18 victory over the New Zealand Warriors at Accor Stadium, with young Blues representative Casey McLean delivering a match-winning performance just days after his Stat...
